headline: $20M Boosts Crypto Candidates in 3 US Primaries

article.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries
article.summary: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.

headline: Tether Purchases 20% Stake in Bitcoin Firm

article.title: Tether buys SoftBank’s stake in Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital
article.summary: The stablecoin issuer bought SoftBank’s 26% stake, expanding its control over the public Bitcoin holder as it moves into lending, mining and capital markets.

headline: DOJ Probes BlackRock $50B Credit Fund Valuations

article.title: BlackRock Private Credit Fund’s Valuations Are Probed by DOJ
article.summary: Bloomberg's Olivia Fishlow joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Federal prosecutors are scrutinizing valuation practices at a BlackRock private credit fund, according to people with knowledge of the matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Alibaba's Qwen 3.7 AI Boosts Crypto 37% Overnight

article.summary: Alibaba's Qwen 3.7 Max landed on Arena AI five days before the Cloud Summit and earned its spot. We tested it to see if the preview was as good as it seemed.

headline: OpenAI Eyes $1B IPO Filing Within Days

article.title: OpenAI Set to File for IPO Within Days, Targeting September Listing: WSJ
article.summary: ChatGPT maker OpenAI is reportedly targeting a September public debut after the Elon Musk lawsuit dismissal clears legal obstacles.

headline: Securitize Hits $3.4B AUM in Tokenized Assets

article.title: Securitize posts record Q1 revenue, $3.4 billion in tokenized assets under management
article.summary: Securitize said it now services roughly 650 active funds and processed $1.9 billion in transaction volume during the quarter.

headline: Coinbase Debuts Stablecoin Platform with Flipcash Launch

article.title: Kik founder’s latest app Flipcash first to tap Coinbase’s stablecoin-as-a-service platform
article.summary: Coinbase rolled out its Custom Stablecoin platform in late 2025 to enable companies to launch branded stablecoins.

headline: Crude Plunges 6% on Hormuz Tanker Crossing

article.summary: Brent crude falls below $105 a barrel as vessels bound for Asia raise hopes of resumption of energy flows

headline: Energy Stocks Plunge 10% Amid Crisis Fears
